# Graham MacAree

> This is the personal site of Graham MacAree — engineer, editor and analyst. Essays, CV, and notes on the custom tooling used in development.

## About

Personal site at [grahammacaree.com](https://grahammacaree.com/). Writing includes long-form essays and a professional CV. The site was built using a custom static generator (Google Docs → sync → HTML), deployed on GitHub Pages. Generator code is open source; essay text is not licensed for reuse.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://grahammacaree.com/): Stories and why they matter, even in fields you might not expect
- [CV](https://grahammacaree.com/cv.html): Career highlights from 15+ years running technical and editorial teams
- [How this website was built](https://grahammacaree.com/about-this-site.html): Architecture and tradeoffs of the static site generator created for this site
- [Baseball’s great potato caper](https://grahammacaree.com/stories/baseball-potato.html): when the grind of baseball got too much, Dave Bresnahan looked for answers in a surprising place
- [Why is the far side of the moon so weird?](https://grahammacaree.com/stories/dark-side-of-the-moon.html): the moon is 15km thicker on one side than the other — how does something like that happen?

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/grahammacaree/personal_page): generator, templates, and build scripts (MIT). Essays are all rights reserved.
